component.name: Box
component.description: The foundational layout primitive. A polymorphic container that applies spacing tokens via the padding props and controls overflow clipping. Everything else in the system can be placed inside a Box.

when: Wrapping content that needs padding without imposing flex or grid layout
Providing semantic HTML structure via the as prop (section, article, aside, main)
Creating a padded surface or card-like region before Card is available

patterns.name: padded-surface
patterns.description: A Box wrapping a Stack to create a padded vertical content region.

antiPatterns.scenario: Using Box to apply flex or grid layout
antiPatterns.reason: Box has no layout opinions beyond padding. It is not a flex container.
antiPatterns.alternative: Use Stack for vertical flex layout or Inline for horizontal flex layout

antiPatterns.scenario: Nesting Boxes purely to add padding when a single Box with paddingX/paddingY suffices
antiPatterns.reason: Unnecessary nesting inflates the DOM and makes spacing harder to reason about
antiPatterns.alternative: Use the paddingX and paddingY props on a single Box to apply asymmetric spacing

purpose.default: A generic padded container. Rendered as div by default; override with the as prop for semantic HTML.
